title: The Street of Forgotten Men
writer: George Kibbe Turner, John Russell, Paul Schofield
actors: Percy Marmont, Neil Hamilton, Mary Brian
plot: Easy-Money Charley, the best fake crippled beggar in New York, loses his beloved dog and adopts a dying prostitute's daughter to fill the empty place in his heart. But his fellow crooks and dissemblers mock him for sentimentality,...
